term_cond_content: We understand the nature & sensitivity of your personal data & have taken strong measures to ensure that your data is not compromised.
device_location_content: MySIS uses location Data to verify the location from which Attendance is being marked and then uses it to verify your location while on Duty and requires permission for the same. The nature of usage is in the background “when the app is in use.”
sms_content: MySIS requires permission to access your SMS data for reading OTP during processes like changing PIN & Contact Number
recommend_to_keep_the_device_location: It's recommended to keep the device's location always on, to use this App productively.
camera_content: MySIS requires permission to access your phone camera to take pictures while marking attendance & Changing Profile Image
contact_content: MySIS requires permission to access your phone contacts to allow phone calls to be made through the links provided in the application
sis_group_wishes: SIS Group wishes you a healthy, happy and successful year ahead!

boardingleave: Leave application & approval made paperless & simple!

boarding_6_header: Get your problems sorted out through ERC - on WhatsApp!
